method_summary: The AI Scientist is an AI system that generates novel research ideas, writes code, executes experiments, visualizes results, writes full scientific papers, and runs a simulated review process in an open-ended fashion.
key_innovation: A fully automated system that performs the entire scientific discovery process from idea generation to paper writing and evaluation at less than $15 per paper.

key_results.reviewer_performance: near-human performance in evaluating paper scores

best_result: The AI Scientist can produce papers that exceed the acceptance threshold at a top machine learning conference as judged by the automated reviewer.
title: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery
